summary: Iteration 27: Complete validation of RBAC implementation and App.js refactor. Backend 100% passed (18/18 tests), Frontend 100% passed. All features working correctly after the massive refactor.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns token and user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/permissions/roles returns list of 7 roles with correct structure (value, label, group, description, level)
Backend: GET /api/permissions/my-role/{brand_id} returns role, permissions, and is_platform_admin
Backend: GET /api/permissions/my-role with invalid brand_id handled correctly
Backend: GET /api/brands returns user's brands list
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads with content (not blank screen)
Frontend: AppPage wrapper renders correctly (ProtectedRoute + BrandProvider + PermissionProvider + MainLayout)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation visible on all protected pages
Frontend: User menu dropdown opens correctly
Frontend: Re-login after logout works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: AppPage wrapper correctly chains ProtectedRoute > BrandProvider > PermissionProvider > MainLayout for all protected routes
PermissionContext.js: Properly loads user role and permissions from /api/permissions/my-role/{brand_id} when currentBrand changes
PermissionContext.js: Provides can(), canEdit(), canFull() helper functions for permission checks
permissions.py: Complete RBAC implementation with TEAM_ROLES (7 roles) and PERMISSIONS matrix (11 modules)
permissions.py: get_user_brand_role() correctly handles super_admin, brand owner, and team member roles
permissions.py: check_permission() uses level-based comparison (read < comment < approve < edit < full)
ProtectedRoute.js: Correctly handles loading state and redirects unauthenticated users to /login
BrandContext.js: Auto-fetches brands on authentication and persists selected brand to localStorage
Layout.js: User menu has data-testid='user-menu' and logout button has data-testid='logout-btn'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 validated the RBAC implementation and App.js refactor that was done by the previous agent but never tested. Key findings: 1) AppPage wrapper correctly chains ProtectedRoute > BrandProvider > PermissionProvider > MainLayout, 2) All 7 RBAC roles are returned by GET /api/permissions/roles, 3) GET /api/permissions/my-role/{brand_id} returns user's role and permissions matrix for 11 modules, 4) All protected routes (/dashboard, /planning, /campaigns, /social-listening, /naming, /settings, /reports) load correctly with sidebar visible, 5) Login/logout/re-login flow works correctly. NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real.
notes: This was the first test after the massive RBAC and App.js refactor. All functionality is working correctly. The PermissionContext loads without errors when navigating between pages. The AppPage wrapper properly provides brand and permission context to all protected routes.
